name: Cheese Scalloped Potatoes and Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Bring water to a boil in a frying pan. Add potatoes, onions, and carrots. Cover and cook for 10 minutes, or until tender. Drain.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt margarine over low heat. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until smooth. Bring to a boil, then remove from heat.
4. Add grated cheddar cheese to the sauce, stirring until melted and smooth.
5. Arrange half of the potatoes, onions, and carrots in a greased 9x13 inch baking dish. Pour half of the cheese sauce over the vegetables.
6. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
7. Cover the dish with foil and bake for 30 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
8. Remove foil during the last 10 minutes of cooking.
